pr.title: Various match, attempt to fix m2ctx.py
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Matched several small stage and VI routines, improved symbol names around vi0401 and grTest, added missing includes/prototypes needed by those matches, adjusted an HSD controller queue copy to match codegen, and tried to make m2ctx.py see Dolphin headers by adding extern/dolphin/include to include paths. The PR also removed a local INT_MAX definition from Dolphin types, likely to avoid context/header conflicts, though the exact motivation is not documented in comments.
what_changed: Implemented vi0401 helper routines in C: vi0401_8031D18C animates all JObjs on a GObj, vi0401_8031D1B0 sets the current camera object, applies erase color, erases the screen, runs vi_8031CA04, updates gxlink priority fields, and ends the current CObj, and vi0401_8031D23C animates a CObj and calls lb_800145F4/gm_801A4B60 at animation end.
Renamed vi0401 assembly/symbol entries from generic fn_8031D18C, fn_8031D1B0, and fn_8031D23C to module-prefixed vi0401_8031D18C, vi0401_8031D1B0, and vi0401_8031D23C.
Renamed sbss symbol un_804D6F5C to erase_colors_vi0401 in asm and symbols.txt, matching its use as a GXColor passed to HSD_SetEraseColor.

Matched several grTest functions in C, including simple Zako generator disable calls, animation setup callbacks using GET_GROUND and grAnime_801C8138, a Ground_801C2ED0 setup plus animation call, and a Ground_801C2FE0 callback.
Renamed grTest symbol fn_802073B0 to grTest_802073B0 in symbols.txt and header declarations.
Matched small grOldYoshi routines mirroring the grTest patterns: grOldYoshi_8020E828 disables Zako generation and grOldYoshi_8020E93C runs grAnime_801C8138 using the ground map_id.
Improved headers for grTest and grOldYoshi by replacing several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders with concrete void/bool and HSD_GObj* signatures where evidence from matched C allowed it.
Changed HSD_PadRenewRawStatus in controller.c from a loop copying four PADStatus entries to a local struct wrapper assignment over PADStatus[4], a codegen-oriented tactic for matching a block copy.
Added extern/dolphin/include to both lowercase -i and uppercase -I include argument lists in tools/m2ctx/m2ctx.py.
Removed the INT_MAX macro definition from extern/dolphin/include/dolphin/types.h.
smart_moves: Used module-prefixed fallback names such as vi0401_8031D1B0 and grTest_802073B0 instead of generic fn_* names, improving searchability without overclaiming semantic names.
Promoted un_804D6F5C to erase_colors_vi0401 only after the C implementation showed the object is used as a GXColor source for HSD_SetEraseColor.
Kept vi0401 helper routines static in C while updating assembly and symbol names, preserving local helper intent where the C translation does not require exporting them.
Reused common ground-stage idioms: GET_GROUND(gobj), gp->map_id, grAnime_801C8138(gobj, gp->map_id, 0), and Ground_801C2ED0/Ground_801C2FE0 callbacks.
Used a struct containing PADStatus[4] to force a single aggregate copy for the controller raw status queue rather than relying on a for-loop that likely produced different codegen.
Fixed m2ctx include coverage in both compiler-style include lists present in the script, not just one path list.
decomp_lessons: When matching small stage callbacks, many routines reduce to standard patterns: disable Zako generation with grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(false), fetch Ground via GET_GROUND, use map_id, then call grAnime_801C8138.
For unknown but module-local functions, prefer file/module-prefixed address names over fn_* once the owning source file is understood; this improves consistency while staying conservative.
Data symbols should be renamed when usage reveals type/role. Here, an sbss 4-byte object became erase_colors_vi0401 because it is read bytewise as RGBA for HSD_SetEraseColor.
Header cleanup can safely follow matching evidence: replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with concrete bool, void, and HSD_GObj* signatures only where the matched implementation proves them.
Aggregate-copy structs are a useful matching tactic when a compiler-generated fixed-size copy differs from a handwritten element loop.
m2ctx context generation depends on complete include paths; external SDK headers such as extern/dolphin/include may need to be visible to both include-option variants used by the tool.
Avoid redefining standard-looking macros such as INT_MAX in SDK context headers when they can conflict with parser/toolchain context, but this PR does not document the exact conflict.
naming_conventions: Use module/address fallback names like vi0401_8031D18C for unnamed functions owned by vi0401.
Use stage module prefixes such as grTest_802073B0 instead of generic fn_802073B0 once ownership is clear.
Use descriptive data names when a variable's role is clear, as with erase_colors_vi0401 for a GXColor erase-screen color backing object.
Preserve existing address-suffixed naming style for still-unknown decomp functions rather than inventing high-level semantic names.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Renamed assembly labels and all internal references consistently when moving from fn_* to vi0401_* labels.
Kept the vi0401 assembly file synchronized with config/GALE01/symbols.txt and the new C names.
Used a local struct with PADStatus _[4] and assignment through casts to match a four-entry queue copy in HSD_PadRenewRawStatus.
Matched VI camera logic using exact HSD calls: HSD_CObjSetCurrent, HSD_SetEraseColor, HSD_CObjEraseScreen, vi_8031CA04, HSD_GObj_80390ED0, and HSD_CObjEndCurrent.
Matched animation-end logic by comparing aobj->curr_frame to aobj->end_frame before calling lb_800145F4 and gm_801A4B60.
Added required includes such as baselib/gobj.h, gr/inlines.h, gr/granime.h, and gr/grzakogenerator.h to expose macros/types/functions needed for clean C matches.
review_feedback: No explicit human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
There was one issue comment counted in metadata, but no body excerpt was available, so reviewer intent cannot be inferred.
follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs that further fix m2ctx.py include handling or explain the INT_MAX removal from dolphin/types.h.
Search for additional vi0401 matches around un_8031D288, un_8031D698, and un_8031D6E4 to see how these helpers are integrated.
Find similar grTest and grOldYoshi stage callback matches to reuse the GET_GROUND/map_id/grAnime_801C8138 pattern.
Check whether erase_colors_vi0401 receives a stronger semantic name in later PRs.
Search controller.c history for other aggregate-copy or struct-wrapper codegen matching tactics.
